skills.name: Noble Bearing
skills.description: Grants self 1 stack of Chill when a Moon Attribute ally triggers a Critical Hit. Deals 10% increased damage when Epindel uses Orlan Style Swordsmanship at max stacks of Chill. Removes all stacks of Chill after using Orlan Style Swordsmanship.
